title: Gold, silver price March 24: Check latest 24K, 22K, 18K gold rates in Delhi, Mumbai, Chennai, Kolkata
description: On March 24, 2026, gold is priced around Rs 13,564 per gram for 24K and Rs 12,434 per gram for 22K, while silver is near Rs 2,29,900 per kg. Here are the latest city-wise rates.

title: Silver price in Pakistan for today, March 24, 2026
description: Silver rates in Pakistan fluctuate frequently based on international market trends. The rates listed are provided by local gold markets and Sarafa Markets in various cities. The post Silver price in Pakistan for today, March 24, 2026 appeared first on Profit by Pakistan Today .

title: Allocate 10–25% globally, use ETFs for diversification: Himanshu Kohli of Client Associates
description: Amid geopolitical tensions and market volatility, investors are advised to diversify portfolios internationally, allocating 10-25% to global markets for resilience and currency diversification. ETFs offer a cost-effective route to achieve this, with a disciplined approach and rebalancing crucial for navigating uncertainty and achieving long-term goals.

title: Dubai Gold Rate Today: 18K, 22K, 24K Gold Prices for March 24, 2026
description: Dubai gold prices declined further on March 24, 2026, with 24K gold at INR 1,37,500 per 10 grams. Rates remained under pressure due to a stronger dollar and rising yields, while investors tracked global and regional market cues.
